description: Eight V1.6b sensitivity-completed candidates refined at n_null=5000 and contrasted against T2D/BMI and DR residualized against T2D/BMI.
Retinal-only DR-specific fixed-library V1.6b n5000 results across DR_MVP, DR residualized, T2D and BMI.
Synthetic V1.6b stress scenarios for top-locus artifacts, distributed signals, broad modules and sparse retinal modules.
Diagnostic Type I calibration for V1.6b null matching, outer=100 and n_null=200.
Annotation and pseudo-window sensitivity completion for 33 V1.6b high-confidence candidates.
